episodes.title: Bondi testifies about Trump administration’s release of Epstein files
episodes.description:
Former Attorney General Pam Bondi stood behind the Trump administration’s release of the case files on Jeffrey Epstein as she testified Friday before House lawmakers scrutinizing a process that was delayed and included personal information of potential victims.

READ MORE HERE: https://www.local10.com/news/politics/2026/05/29/bondi-refuses-to-answer-lawmakers-questions-about-trumps-involvement-in-epstein-files-release/

episodes.title: Miami Herald investigative journalist Julie K. Brown joins TWISF
episodes.description: A South Florida journalist who is credited with re-opening the sex trafficking case against Jeffrey Epstein was honored last week by a Pulitzer Prize jury.

episodes.title: Federal judge unseals alleged suicide note from Jeffrey Epstein
episodes.description:
A federal judge has unsealed the alleged suicide note from Jeffrey Epstein. The note is barely legible.

READ MORE HERE: https://www.local10.com/news/2026/05/07/judge-releases-note-cellmate-says-he-found-after-epsteins-suspected-suicide-attempt/

episodes.title: Melania Trump says she was unaware of Jeffrey Epstein’s crimes in White House statement
episodes.description: First lady Melania Trump is denying ties to Jeffrey Epstein and knowledge of his sex crimes, saying Thursday that the “stories are completely false” and calling accusations that she was somehow involved “smears about me.”

episodes.title: Bondi won't appear for House deposition next week in the Epstein investigation
episodes.description: The Department of Justice has indicated that former Attorney General Pam Bondi will not appear for a scheduled deposition next week before a House committee investigating how the government handled its investigations into Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Ex-Attorney General Pam Bondi won’t appear for House deposition in Epstein investigation
episodes.description:
The Department of Justice has indicated that former Attorney General Pam Bondi will not appear for a scheduled deposition next week before a House committee investigating how the government handled its investigations into Jeffrey Epstein.

READ MORE HERE: https://www.local10.com/news/politics/2026/04/08/bondi-wont-appear-for-house-deposition-next-week-in-the-epstein-investigation/

episodes.title: Epstein’s former accountant testifies about his money and business network
episodes.description:
House lawmakers were digging into Jeffrey Epstein’s sprawling financial portfolio on Wednesday as a committee deposed his former accountant and tried to understand his connections to some of the world’s wealthiest men.
READ MORE HERE:

episodes.title: Former Prince Andrew facing charges related to Epstein files
episodes.description:
The former Prince Andrew was arrested and held for hours by British police Thursday on suspicion of misconduct in public office related to his links to Jeffrey Epstein, an extraordinary move in a country where authorities once sought to shield the royal family from embarrassment.

READ MORE HERE: https://www.local10.com/entertainment/2026/02/19/former-prince-andrew-arrested-and-held-for-hours-on-suspicion-of-misconduct-over-ties-to-epstein/

episodes.title: Billionaire Les Wexner claims Jeffrey Epstein misled him for years
episodes.description:
The billionaire behind the retail empire that once blanketed shopping malls with names such as Victoria’s Secret and Abercrombie & Fitch told members of Congress on Wednesday that he was “duped by a world-class con man” — close financial adviser Jeffrey Epstein. Les Wexner also denied knowing about the late sex offender’s crimes or participating in Epstein’s abuse of girls and young women.
READ MORE HERE: 
https://www.local10.com/news/politics/2026/02/18/billionaire-les-wexner-says-he-was-duped-by-adviser-jeffrey-epstein-a-world-class-con-man/

episodes.title: Billionaire Les Wexner claims Jeffrey Epstein duped him, labels him a “world-class con man”
episodes.description: The billionaire behind the retail empire that once blanketed shopping malls with names such as Victoria’s Secret and Abercrombie & Fitch told members of Congress on Wednesday that he was “duped by a world-class con man” — close financial adviser Jeffrey Epstein. Les Wexner also denied knowing about the late sex offender’s crimes or participating in Epstein’s abuse of girls and young women.

episodes.title: Hillary Clinton accuses White House of Epstein files cover-up
episodes.description: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton is accusing the White House of a cover-up of the Jeffrey Epstein files. Clinton is speaking out just a week before she's set to testify in Congress' investigation of the infamous sex trafficker.

episodes.title: Hillary Clinton alleges Trump administration concealed Epstein records
episodes.description: Hillary Clinton accused President Donald Trump’s administration of covering up information related to the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, saying the government has mishandled key files.

episodes.title: Congressman reacts to reading unredacted Epstein files
episodes.description: Members of Congress are getting the chance to review the millions of documents in the Epstein files without any redactions.

episodes.title: Congressman: Unredacted Epstein files were 'gross'
episodes.description: Members of Congress are getting the chance to review the millions of documents in the Epstein files without any redactions.

episodes.title: Clintons won't testify about Epstein
episodes.description: Former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton said Tuesday that they will refuse to comply with a congressional subpoena to testify in a House committee’s investigation of Jeffrey Epstein even as Republican lawmakers prepare contempt of Congress proceedings against them.
